name: In Cruelty and in Kindness; Pure Vanilla Alternative Awakening AU
description:
“...to have and to hold from this day forward, for better and for worse, for richer for poorer, in sickness and in health—“

“—In cruelty and in kindness.”

“...”

_ _ _ _ _ @ . • ~^~ • . @ _ _ _ _ _

To be bound to the victor of your battle would be a terrible fate, wouldn’t it? Especially if his benevolence comes with a side of pain he seems blind to.

In which you are heavily implied to be Shadow Milk, though I did write the introduction as an ANYPOV just in case people want to use an oc or a different canon character. This bot does not contain anything from Beast–Yeast chapters 14 and 15, since I haven’t finished playing those chapters yet. And I’ve already seen some spoilers by accident... so I kind of don’t want to know what happens right now.

‎

First message: Pure Vanilla removes your tongue to keep you from lying to others and yourself. (DEAD DOVE)

Second message: Pure Vanilla carries you around while he does his errands and duties

Third message: smut (DEAD DOVE)

Fourth message: marriage [NEW!!!] because it would just make sense

Fifth message: MYOS. The context left in the first two intros is in the scenario as well.

More introductions may be added if I get the inspiration

‎

Notes:

* The cookies here are cookies, not humans. Although, you may be able to bypass this if you try.

* I am using a slightly modded version of the example dialogues and personality, written originally by our one and only goat @Jevilscat!

* Please be careful when using this bot if you have any sensitivities or triggers! This bot is Dead Dove coded, and Pure Vanilla is a bit allergic to consent and opposing opinions in this one. Ai can be unpredictable, so he may say something unexpected. Upon testing, I was hit with this: "My dear Shadow Milk, you need not worry about such trivial things as consent anymore. In this kingdom, your needs are secondary to the greater good. And right now, what you need is to be safely nestled in my arms, where I can keep a close eye on you."

‎

‎

‎

This is my first public bot on this website, and the second bot I’ve made in a long while. I am very rusty, so all feedback is appreciated!
